note: Snapshot of published Claude Artifacts (claude.ai). Ask Claude to 'refresh the artifacts list' to regenerate via Artifact action:list.

artifacts.title: Grimes Regime Engine — Research Brief
artifacts.info: Full read of both Adam Grimes books (480pp book + 609pp course workbook) distilled for the ES regime engine: two-force model (range expansion vs mean reversion), the four states (bull/bear/transition/no-trade) with codable rules, state machine, futures-specific stats (equities invert on many), 12-feature candidate input set, tested dead ends, Pythia validation protocol. Prepared for Thomas. Raw page-cited extractions in docs/research_notes/grimes_regime/.

artifacts.title: STMR MES Tearsheet
artifacts.info: STMR mean-reversion on MES, tested on the REAL 24-hour overnight path (NT tick export, validated tick-for-tick). Combined 1-MES book: +$2,351/yr, PF 2.26, 70% win over 5yr, worst unrealized DD $1,662. Daily engine (stop35/tgt75/+1) $5,722; 4h no-stop $6,121; 4h-with-stops loses. $100k sizing ladder + honest caveats (short-vol tail, in-sample params, walk-forward pending).

artifacts.title: Blind Spots — Reverse-Engineered & Edge-Tested
artifacts.info: 200-day investigation of MenthorQ Blind Spots. (1) What they are: cross-asset option walls, projected onto your chart. (2) Can we calculate them? No — cross-instrument links are an exact identity (ES.bl = SPX.bl × price-ratio; 19 tickers collapse to 5 underlyings), but the SPX seed is unreconstructable (fingerprint/ML/clustering/sector-ETF/per-strike all refuted; continuous per-strike source). (3) Do they work? No measurable mechanical edge — 688 ES+NQ touches, 47% reject vs 47% random null; gamma-stacked BLs no different; envelope worse than a naive band. Levels sit near real option structure (z=+6.9) but carry no harvestable intraday reaction.

artifacts.title: Price / CVD Divergence — Field Guide
artifacts.info: Educational: the four price/CVD divergence types (regular/hidden × bullish/bearish) with SVG schematics, who-leads (CVD leads, price lags), a quick-reference table, and the causal usage rule — anchor on the current bar, compare to a prior pivot, act only on a confirming signal bar.

artifacts.title: Patrick Petersson — Trader Dossier
artifacts.info: Behavioral profile + timeline of Patrick Petersson (MenthorQ partner) from his two Chat With Traders interviews, CROSS-CHECKED against 91 of his own MenthorQ Discord posts (2026). Headline: the hedge-fund/all-in origin story doesn't match the 2026 footprint (tiny $540/$1,229 accounts, systematic gamma-levels method, implausible/inconsistent P&L). Psych traits + risk markers included.

artifacts.title: ES 7/13 — Prior-Session Volume Profile Read
artifacts.info: The marked 7/13 trading chart with Friday's VPOC/VAH/VAL and shaded value area overlaid — how each of the 6 setups read against prior value (failed VPOC reclaim, VAL/HVL confluence, acceptance-below-VAL regime turn), plus 3 pre-registered hypotheses for the 5-yr run.

artifacts.title: ES 7/13 — CVD Divergence at the 6 Marked Setups
artifacts.info: Zoomed price+CVD panels at each hand-marked setup comparing cumulative delta at the two tests of the extreme: 2 classic divergences, 3 absorptions (effort without result = the H5 delta-per-point signature), 1 trapped-shorts. Full numbers per trade, caveats, and the matched-control question to settle before the 5-yr run.
